About ACR Engineering

Stronger communities
through stronger structures

ACR Engineering is a design and construction firm based in Iloilo City. Primarily focused on structural and plumbing services, we have since expanded — through the expertise of our associates — to offer complete design and building solutions across multiple disciplines.

Our goal is to provide quality, safe, and remarkable engineering design that brings peace of mind and lasting value to every home and investment.

We believe that great projects are achieved through structural clarity. With an interdisciplinary and peer-reviewed approach to structural engineering, we deliver precise design drawings that are safe, economical, and fully code-compliant.

3D Structural Frame

What We Do

Serving people through structures

We believe that access to safe structures should never be a privilege, but a right for everyone. At ACR Engineering, we ensure you receive greater value than what you paid for.

01
Structural Analysis & Design

Comprehensive structural modeling and code-compliant design for steel, concrete, and composite systems.

02
Building Inspection & Assessment

Condition assessment, damage evaluation, and structural capacity analysis of existing buildings affected by earthquakes or requiring renovation, retrofitting, or expansion.

03
Construction Management

On-site project supervision, Management, and quality assurance throughout all phases of construction.

04
Structural BIM Modeling

Development of accurate and detailed Building Information Models (BIM) for structural and multidisciplinary projects enhancing project visualization, interdisciplinary coordination, clash detection, constructability review, and overall efficiency throughout the design and construction process.

05
Evacuation Simulation

Evacuation Simulation – Performance-based, agent-based evacuation simulation services for buildings and complex facilities, evaluating occupant movement, egress efficiency, crowd behavior, and emergency response scenarios.

06
Other Services

Wide range of multidisciplinary engineering services beyond core structural design, delivering integrated solutions across planning, analysis, documentation, and construction support.

Selected Work

Designing ripples that inspire lasting waves

Every structure we design carries a purpose — built for the people, communities, and futures we are proud to serve.

Government Building · Ongoing
5 Storey Building with Roof Deck
Started in 2022, this building has a total floor area of approximately 4,000+ sq.m. It uses a Reinforced Concrete Special Moment Resisting Frame supported by a Mat Foundation.
